title: Private AI Platform Kit
description: A runnable, vendor-neutral Kubernetes platform for private LLM serving, RAG, and coding-agent workspaces, with an evidence model that turns regulatory requirements (EU AI Act, DORA, GDPR) into machine-checkable controls: request lineage, access and model governance, and model provenance. This is the artifact accompanying the paper "Auditable Private LLM Serving on Kubernetes: A Vendor-Neutral Architecture and Evidence Model for Regulated Environments."
